title: centaurea baldaccii
intro: Centaurea baldaccii, also known as Balbis' cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Italy and the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Centaurea baldaccii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Centaurea baldaccii can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also available in herbal supplement form, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
